summary: Missing `Set-StrictMode -Version Latest` in both .ps1 scripts (critical PS best practice). Action `actions/checkout@v4` not SHA-pinned; use commit hash (~40 hex chars) per security policy. Output parsing in Run-ActTests.ps1 line ~165 is brittle (regex `[^|]*\|` assumes act prefix format). EnvironmentMatrix.Tests.ps1 referenced in workflow but not provided—cannot verify Pester coverage. Cartesian product logic (lines 49–68) and exclude filtering (lines 70–80) lack inline explanation of complex iteration. Otherwise: good error handling, least-privilege permissions, modular function design, clear variable names.
